NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IAppCastGenerator
public interface
NetSparkleUpdater.​Interfaces.​IAppCastGenerator
NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​JsonAppCastGenerator
NetSparkleUpdater.​AppCastHandlers.​XMLAppCastGenerator

Interface used by objects that serialize and deserialize  objects to/from strings/files.  Implement this interface if you would like to use a custom serialize/deserialize method for your app cast that isn't yet built into NetSparkle.

Functions
DeserializeAppCast
AppCast DeserializeAppCast(
string 
appCastString
)

Deserialize the app cast string into a list of AppCastItem objects.  When complete, the  list should contain the parsed information as AppCastItem objects that are sorted in reverse order like so: appCast.Items.Sort((item1, item2) => -1 * item1.CompareTo(item2));

Parameter
appCastString
string

the non-null app cast

DeserializeAppCastAsync
Task<AppCast> DeserializeAppCastAsync(
string 
appCastString
)

Deserialize the app cast string asynchronously into a list of AppCastItem objects.  When complete, the  list should contain the parsed information as AppCastItem objects that are sorted in reverse order like so: appCast.Items.Sort((item1, item2) => -1 * item1.CompareTo(item2));

Parameter
appCastString
string

the non-null app cast

DeserializeAppCastFromFile
AppCast DeserializeAppCastFromFile(
string 
filePath
)

Deserialize the app cast from a file at the given path into a list of AppCastItem objects.  When complete, the  list should contain the parsed information as AppCastItem objects that are sorted in reverse order like so: appCast.Items.Sort((item1, item2) => -1 * item1.CompareTo(item2));

Parameter
filePath
string

Path to the file on disk to deserialize

DeserializeAppCastFromFileAsync
Task<AppCast> DeserializeAppCastFromFileAsync(
string 
filePath
)

Deserialize the app cast from a file at the given path asynchronously into a list of AppCastItem objects.  When complete, the  list should contain the parsed information as AppCastItem objects that are sorted in reverse order like so: appCast.Items.Sort((item1, item2) => -1 * item1.CompareTo(item2));

Parameter
filePath
string

Path to the file on disk to deserialize

SerializeAppCast
string SerializeAppCast(
AppCast 
appCast
)

Serialize the given AppCast to a string.  objects should have at least their version and download link set.

Parameter
appCast
AppCast

AppCast to serialize

Returns

The string representation of the given AppCast

SerializeAppCastAsync
Task<string> SerializeAppCastAsync(
AppCast 
appCast
)

Serialize the given AppCast to a string asyncronously.  objects should have at least their version and download link set.

Parameter
appCast
AppCast

AppCast to serialize

Returns

The string representation of the given AppCast

SerializeAppCastToFile
void SerializeAppCastToFile(
AppCast 
appCast,
string 
outputPath
)

Serialize the given AppCast to a file. Can overwrite old file, at any, at the given path.  objects should have at least their version and download link set.

Parameters
appCast
AppCast

AppCast to serialize

outputPath
string

Output path for data.

SerializeAppCastToFileAsync
Task SerializeAppCastToFileAsync(
AppCast 
appCast,
string 
outputPath
)

Serialize the given AppCast to a file asyncronously. Can overwrite old file, at any, at the given path.  objects should have at least their version and download link set.

Parameters
appCast
AppCast

AppCast to serialize

outputPath
string

Output path for data.

Returns

The  that can be await'ed for this operation
